title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Zostel - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Zostel - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Reservation Manager with drive and ambition, Zostel in Aurangabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Zostel:
Zostel is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zostel!
